info.title: Leywn
info.description:
Last Echo You Will Need — an all-in-one demo backend for APIs and services.

All endpoints support content negotiation: include `Accept: application/xml` to receive XML instead of the default JSON. Set `LEYWN_ONLY_JSON=true` to disable XML and always return JSON.

CORS headers are added to every response. Set `LEYWN_CORS_ORIGIN` to restrict the allowed origin (default: `*`).

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Authentication demo endpoints (Basic Auth, API Key, JWT, mTLS)

tags.name: Random
tags.description: Random value generators (integers, UUIDs, Lorem Ipsum, names, emails, colors)

tags.name: Info
tags.description: Caller information and server time endpoints

tags.name: Utility
tags.description: Utility endpoints (status codes, images, delay, stream, health)

/request-collection.description: Returns an Insomnia v4 export JSON containing all Leywn endpoints with example requests. Import directly into Insomnia. The `base_url` environment variable defaults to the running server's HTTP port.

/health.description: Returns the server status, version, and uptime. Suitable for use as a Kubernetes liveness/readiness probe.

/echo.description: Returns all details of the incoming request: method, path, query parameters, headers, host, scheme, remote IP, and body (if text/UTF-8, up to the configured byte limit). The `path` property always starts with a leading `/`.

/echo/{path}.description: Same as `/echo` but also captures the sub-path.

/anything.description: Identical to `/echo` — returns all details of the incoming request. Provided as a convenience alias.

/anything/{path}.summary: Echo all request information – alias sub-path

/delay/{ms}.description: Waits the requested number of milliseconds before responding. Useful for testing timeouts and retry logic. The delay is clamped to 30 000 ms.

parameters.name: ms
parameters.description: Milliseconds to wait (0–30000; values above 30000 are clamped)

/stream/{n}.description: Returns a chunked HTTP response with `n` newline-delimited JSON objects (`application/x-ndjson`). Each line is flushed individually. Maximum 100 lines.

/status/{code}.description: Responds with the requested HTTP status code. Informational (1xx) and no-content (204, 304) responses have an empty body; all others include `{"status": <code>}`.

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: HTTP status code in the range 100–599

/auth/basic-auth.description: Enforces HTTP Basic Authentication with username `basic` and password `password`. Returns 401 with a `WWW-Authenticate` header if credentials are missing or wrong.

get.summary: Authenticate with Basic Auth (user: basic, pass: password)

/auth/basic-auth/{username}/{password}.description: Enforces HTTP Basic Authentication with the credentials specified in the path.

get.summary: Authenticate with custom Basic Auth credentials

post.summary: Authenticate with custom Basic Auth credentials

put.summary: Authenticate with custom Basic Auth credentials

patch.summary: Authenticate with custom Basic Auth credentials

delete.summary: Authenticate with custom Basic Auth credentials

/auth/api-key.description: Enforces an API key by checking that the request includes the header `apikey: my-key`.

/auth/api-key/{header_name}/{key_value}.description: Enforces an API key by checking that the request includes a header named `header_name` with value `key_value`.

get.summary: Authenticate with custom API key header and value

/auth/jwt.description: Enforces a Bearer JWT in the `Authorization` header. Validates structure and decodes header/claims — does **not** verify the signature.

get.summary: Validate JWT and return decoded claims

200.description: Valid JWT — returns decoded header and claims

/auth/jwt/exchange.summary: Exchange a JWT for a Leywn-signed JWT
/auth/jwt/exchange.description: Accepts a structurally valid Bearer JWT. Validates the structure (not the signature), then issues a new JWT signed with the server's HS256 key.

get.summary: Exchange JWT for a Leywn-signed token

200.description: A new HS256 JWT signed by Leywn

/auth/mtls.description: Validates that the client presented a certificate signed by the Leywn demo CA. Must be called on the **HTTPS port**.

/auth/mtls/get-client-cert.summary: Download the generated client certificate and key

200.description: Client certificate and key in PEM format

get.summary: Random GUID (UUID v4 in curly braces)
Returns one of each random type

200.description: A bundle of all random types

/random/int/{lower}/{upper}.summary: Random signed integer in custom range

get.summary: Random integer between lower and upper (inclusive)
Returns up to 32 Lorem Ipsum paragraphs

/random/name.description: Returns a random name from `priv/names.txt`. Override the source file with `LEYWN_NAMES_FILE`.

/random/email.description: Returns a randomly generated email address. Names from `priv/names.txt`, domains from `priv/email_domains.txt`. Override with `LEYWN_NAMES_FILE` / `LEYWN_EMAIL_DOMAINS_FILE`.

/random/color.description: Returns a random colour as a hex string and R/G/B component values.

/ip.description: Returns the caller's IPv4 and/or IPv6 address. When `LEYWN_TRUST_FORWARD=true`, uses `X-Forwarded-For`.

/date/{timezone}.summary: Current date in a given timezone

get.summary: Current date in the given timezone

/time/{timezone}.summary: Current time in a given timezone

get.summary: Current time in the given timezone

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Image format: png, jpeg, jpg, gif, svg, webp

/image/color/{rgb}/{width}/{height}.summary: Solid-colour PNG image at custom size

post.summary: Collapse multiple blank lines into one

PlainBody.description: Raw text or JSON body to transform

unprocessable.description: Input could not be parsed / transformed
